Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2108 "ARMYMOVES-SIDE2-CC50-2108" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $cc50 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Army Moves (Side 2).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $CC50 to set $F503 to $01 which skips the code entry step.
